name: joaoalvess-skills
description: Personal automation skills for Codex, including Alexa smart-home control and Spotify playback control on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Control Alexa devices and Spotify playback from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Joaoalvess Skills to control Amazon Alexa devices, smart-home routines, and Spotify playback from Codex with local macOS automation and a preconfigured alexa-remote-control setup.
interface.defaultPrompt: Control Alexa devices, routines, and Spotify playback from my Mac using these local automation skills.
